name: autoctr-shared
description: Shared backend modules used by both the Vercel dashboard (/dashboard) and the local PM2 workers (/worker). The workers run /shared/workers/trafficWorker.js as their PM2 entry point, so Node module resolution walks UP from /shared/ — that's why the runtime deps live here. The Vercel dashboard reaches the same files via the @server/* webpack alias and ships its own copy of the deps it actually imports.

scripts.noop: echo 'shared/ has no scripts of its own'
